name: Denial of Service Verification Grimoire
description: Expert procedure for verifying denial of service vulnerabilities. Tests for unbounded loops, gas limit issues, strict equality checks, and external call failure handling.
author: VKG Team

steps.name: Analyze Loop Bounds
steps.description: Analyze loop iteration bounds and gas consumption

steps.name: Generate DoS Test
steps.description: Generate Foundry test to trigger DoS condition

steps.name: Execute Gas Test
steps.description: Run test to measure gas consumption with increasing input

steps.name: Fuzz for DoS Conditions
steps.description: Fuzz to find inputs that cause excessive gas

steps.name: Analyze Results
steps.description: Analyze gas consumption and DoS potential

verdict_rules.explanation: Unbounded loop with external calls - high DoS risk
Strict equality check could cause unexpected reverts
No unbounded loops or problematic patterns
